common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

home.title: Toqui
home.subtitle: Plan smarter trips with AI-powered local experts. Get personalized recommendations, manage bookings, and navigate like a local.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need for better trips
home.feature1Desc: Chat with AI local guides, food critics, history buffs, and more — each one specialized in their destination.
home.feature2Desc: Just chat about what you want. Toqui builds your itinerary as you talk — no forms to fill out.
home.feature3Desc: Your conversations become day-by-day plans, automatically organized with times, locations, and tips.
home.feature4Desc: Paste or forward confirmation emails and AI extracts all the details into your trip automatically.
home.feature5Desc: Get live recommendations, directions, and local tips while you travel — your pocket travel expert.
home.feature6Desc: From hidden gems to popular spots, discover the best of every destination with personalized suggestions.
home.step1Desc: Describe where you want to go and what you're into. Toqui matches you with the right expert personas.
home.step2Desc: Have a natural conversation. Get restaurant picks, activity ideas, and logistics sorted out as you chat.
home.step3Desc: Your itinerary and bookings are all in one place. Switch to companion mode for real-time help on the go.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to plan your next trip?
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of travelers planning smarter trips with Toqui. Free to start, no credit card required.

trips.title: My Trips
trips.empty: No trips yet. Start planning your next adventure!

tripCreate.title: New Trip
tripCreate.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. First time visiting, interested in food and temples, traveling as a couple

tripSettings.title: Trip Settings
tripSettings.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to delete this trip? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteWarning: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

billing.title: Plan & Billing
billing.freeDescription: Basic travel planning with AI companion
billing.proDescription: Full access to expert personas and unbiased recommendations

chat.planningPrompt: Start planning your trip! Tell me where you want to go.
chat.companionPrompt: I'm your travel companion. Ask me anything about your surroundings!
chat.errorMessage: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again.

checkout.title: Unlock Trip Pro

benefits.experts: Unlimited access to local expert personas
benefits.email: Email forwarding for automatic booking import

checkout.successDescription: You now have full Pro access for this trip.
checkout.webOnly: Payments are currently available on the web version.

waitlist.title: We're at capacity!
waitlist.description: Toqui is in limited beta and we've reached our current user limit. Join the waitlist and we'll let you know as soon as a spot opens up.
waitlist.joinedDescription: We'll notify you by email when your spot is ready.
waitlist.estimatedWait: We're letting people in as fast as we can.
waitlist.notifyMessage: Keep an eye on your inbox — we'll email you when it's your turn.
waitlist.inviteDescription: If you received an invite code, enter it below to skip the waitlist.
